title: ONTRAS Commissions Transport Pipeline at the Bad LauchstÃ¤dt Energy Park â€“ First Section of the Hydrogen Core network in eastern Germany
content: At the Bad LauchstÃ¤dt Energy Park (EBL), the 25-kilometre-long transport pipeline connecting the electrolyser under construction with the TotalEnergies Central Germany refinery in Leuna will go into operation. Several milestones have been reached with the initial filling of the pipeline: On the one hand, work on a further value creation stage of the energy park has been completed and the pipeline can now transport hydrogen. At the same time, ONTRAS has completed the first section of the hydrogen core network in eastern Germany with this pipeline section and thus also the first part of the ONTRAS H2 start-up network. As the centerpiece, the long-distance gas pipeline (SMA) 701 enables the connection of other projects of the hydrogen core network, according to Green Octopus Central Germany (GO!) Direction Magdeburg-Salzgitter or Central German Chemical Triangle and Leipzig-Halle region (LHyVE).
author: Analysts Account
